description: ContactPicker renders '+ Add new contact' button with separator when onAddNew prop is provided
ContactPicker does NOT render '+ Add new contact' button when onAddNew prop is omitted
ContactPicker button has Plus icon and correct styling (w-full flex items-center gap-2 px-3 py-2)
Clicking ContactPicker '+ Add new contact' calls onAddNew callback exactly once
Clicking ContactPicker '+ Add new contact' closes the dropdown (isOpen becomes false)
QuickAddTicket: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact dialog
QuickAddTicket: QuickAddContact receives the currently selected clientId as selectedClientId
QuickAddTicket: after creating contact via QuickAddContact, new contact is added to contacts list and auto-selected
TicketProperties: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact with ticket's company_id
QuickAddInteraction: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact with selectedClientId
OverallInteractionsFeed: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact
ProjectQuickAdd: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact with selectedClientId
Projects list: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact
ClientDetails: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact with clientId pre-filled
BillingConfigForm: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact
UserManagement: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact
EntraReconciliationQueue: clicking '+ Add new contact' opens QuickAddContact
ClientPicker renders '+ Add new client' button with separator when onAddNew prop is provided
ClientPicker does NOT render '+ Add new client' button when onAddNew prop is omitted
Clicking ClientPicker '+ Add new client' calls onAddNew and closes dropdown
QuickAddTicket: clicking '+ Add new client' opens QuickAddClient dialog
QuickAddTicket: after creating client via QuickAddClient, new client is added to list and auto-selected
ProjectQuickAdd: clicking '+ Add new client' opens QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
ContractBasicsStep: clicking '+ Add new client' opens QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
ManualInvoices: clicking '+ Add new client' opens QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
QuickAddAsset: clicking '+ Add new client' opens QuickAddClient and auto-selects new client
QuickAddCategory component renders with category name input field
QuickAddCategory shows board selector when preselectedBoardId is NOT provided
QuickAddCategory hides board selector when preselectedBoardId IS provided
QuickAddCategory shows optional parent category dropdown filtered to selected board's categories
QuickAddCategory calls createCategory action on submit and invokes onCategoryCreated callback
QuickAddCategory shows validation error when category name is empty
QuickAddCategory shows validation error when board is required but not selected
QuickAddCategory fetches boards internally when boards prop is not provided
CategoriesSettings uses QuickAddCategory component for the add dialog
CategoriesSettings create-category flow still works after refactor (name, board, parent, display_order)
CategoriesSettings edit-category flow still works after refactor
TreeSelect renders '+ Add new' button with separator when onAddNew prop is provided
TreeSelect does NOT render '+ Add new' button when onAddNew is omitted
CategoryPicker passes onAddNew prop through to TreeSelect
QuickAddTicket: clicking '+ Add new category' opens QuickAddCategory with boardId pre-selected
QuickAddTicket: after creating category via QuickAddCategory, new category is added to list and auto-selected
TicketInfo: clicking '+ Add new category' opens QuickAddCategory with ticket's board_id
TicketingDashboard: clicking '+ Add new category' opens QuickAddCategory
TicketDetails: clicking '+ Add new category' opens QuickAddCategory with board context
Existing jest tests pass: npx jest --testPathPattern='QuickAddTicket|ContactPicker|TicketProperties|ClientPicker|CategoryPicker'
